category.name: zoo.shop.specials.powerUps
category.item: With the 30% booster you will get 30% more BZ for 1 hour! If you buy 2 of the same boosters, the time will be extended. Tip: One 30% BZ booster and one 100% BZ booster are valid at the same time and will reward you with 130% more BZ for the entire 1 hour.

With the 100% BZ booster, you get 100% more BZ for the entire 1 hour! If you buy 2 of the same boosters, the time will be extended. Tip: one 100% BZ booster and one 30% BZ booster are valid at the same time, so you get 130% more BZ for the entire 1 hour!

With the 30% Paw Booster you get 30% more Paws for the entire 1 hour! If you buy 2 of the same boosters, the time will be extended. Tip: one 30% Paw Booster and one 100% Paw Booster are valid at the same time, so you get 130% more Paws for the entire 1 hour!

With the 100% Paw Booster you get 100% more Paws for the entire 1 hour! If you buy 2 of the same boosters, the time will be extended. Tip: one 100% Paw Booster and one 30% Paw Booster are valid at the same time, so you get 130% more Paws for the entire 1 hour!
With the board game booster, you'll get double the amount of collectibles that will pop out of the enclosures for 1 hour! If you want to extend this time, buy more boosters.

With a 30% booster, you will get 30% extra zoogros from your shops for 1 hour! If you buy 2 of the same boosters, the time will be extended. Tip: One 30% zoogros booster and one 100% zoogros booster are valid at the same time and will reward you with 130% extra zoogros for the entire 1 hour.

With a 100% booster, you will get 100% extra zoogros from your shops for 1 hour! If you buy 2 of the same boosters, the time will be extended. Tip: One 100% zoogros booster and one 30% zoogros booster are valid at the same time and will reward you with 130% extra zoogros for the entire 1 hour.

Rare hybrids made easy! The Breeding Station Booster will ensure that your hatchlings reach at least one level higher than the lowest level of one of their parents within 24 hours. But be careful: The Booster only works if you pick up the hatchling from the Breeding Station.
